|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130907190659/http://urbancinefile.com.au/home/view.asp?a=4837&s=Features |url-status=dead }} Norwegian actress and director [[Liv Ullmann]] served as the Jury President of the main competition; she replaced American actress and filmmaker [[Jodie Foster]], who had to step down due to scheduling conflicts with the film ''[[Panic Room]]''.{{cite web|title=Foster replacement Ullmann signals more Eurocentric Cannes|website=[[The Guardian]]|date=12 February 2001|access-date=8 February 2026|url=https://www.theguardian.com/film/2001/feb/12/cannes2001.cannesfilmfestival}} Italian filmmaker [[Nanni Moretti]] won the ''[[Palme d'Or]]'' for the drama film ''[[The Son's Room]]''.{{cite
